Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Algorithm Visualizer 172 upvotes, 8 comments
  2. A Eulogy for Vim 22 upvotes, 0 comments
  3. Microbenchmarking Chipsets for Giggles 40 upvotes, 2 comments
  4. Show HN: I took back Video.js after 16 years and we rewrote it to be 88% smaller 534 upvotes, 107 comments
  5. Hubble Snaps a New Dazzling Photo of the Crab Nebula 13 upvotes, 0 comments
  6. VNDB founder Yorhel has died 121 upvotes, 23 comments
  7. The Last Testaments of Richard II and Henry IV 65 upvotes, 12 comments
  8. TurboQuant: Redefining AI efficiency with extreme compression 363 upvotes, 102 comments
  9. Thoughts on Slowing the Fuck Down 33 upvotes, 5 comments
  10. Flighty Airports 448 upvotes, 155 comments
  11. My Astrophotography in the Movie Project Hail Mary 274 upvotes, 92 comments
  12. Antimatter has been transported for the first time 97 upvotes, 31 comments
  13. Musketeer d'Artagnan's remains believed found under Dutch church 8 upvotes, 0 comments
  14. I wanted to build vertical SaaS for pest control, so I took a technician job 378 upvotes, 158 comments
  15. Local LLM App by Ente 198 upvotes, 81 comments
  16. Tell HN: Litellm 1.82.7 and 1.82.8 on PyPI are compromised 841 upvotes, 459 comments
  17. Meta told to pay $375M for misleading users over child safety 386 upvotes, 205 comments
  18. Apple Business 690 upvotes, 385 comments
  19. Building a coding agent in Swift from scratch 31 upvotes, 10 comments
  20. VitruvianOS – Desktop Linux Inspired by the BeOS 269 upvotes, 166 comments
  21. Sony V. Cox Decision Reversed 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  22. Goodbye to Sora 950 upvotes, 694 comments
  23. Supreme Court Sides with Cox in Copyright Fight over Pirated Music 93 upvotes, 56 comments
  24. Arm AGI CPU 388 upvotes, 283 comments
  25. Why I forked httpx 206 upvotes, 146 comments
  26. Ubuntu wants to strip some of GRUB features in 26.10 for security purposes 25 upvotes, 11 comments
  27. Looking at Unity made me understand the point of C++ coroutines 103 upvotes, 85 comments
  28. Apple Just Lost Me 349 upvotes, 336 comments
  29. In Edison’s Revenge, Data Centers Are Transitioning From AC to DC 222 upvotes, 270 comments
  30. Miscellanea: The War in Iran 156 upvotes, 192 comments

Last generated 12:30am, 26 March 2026. Source here.
